name: Goldbach's Conjecture
description: Verify Goldbach's conjecture: every even number > 2 is the sum of two primes.
intuition: Sieve primes up to n. For each even number 4..n, find all pairs (p, q) where p+q=n and both are prime. Goldbach's conjecture remains unproven but holds for all checked values up to 4×10^18.

size.label: Upper bound (even numbers up to this)
